arts.ttl: Alexander Isak transfer update: Arsenal, Liverpool sent warning as battle for Newcastle United star intensifies
arts.sum: Newcastle United CEO Darren Eales speaks out on Alexander Isak's future amidst claims that Arsenal and Liverpool hold interest in the striker.

arts.ttl: Slot said ref Oliver to blame if Liverpool fail to win title
arts.sum: Arne Slot told referee Michael Oliver he would blame him if Liverpool fail to win the Premier League.

arts.ttl: PSG vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing PSG vs Liverpool in the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie on Wednesday night including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd's dream Amorim replacements; Nunez makes Liverpool exit decision
arts.sum: Wednesday's footbal transfer rumours, with updates on Ruben Amorim, Darwin Nunez, Rafael Leao, Joshua Kimmich, Andre Onana & more.

arts.ttl: PSG vs. Liverpool: Arne Slot sent "favourites" warning before Champions League clash as Barcelona comparison made
arts.sum: Ex-Liverpool striker John Aldridge warns the Reds that they are no longer the favourites to win the Champions League following their nightmare draw.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer update: Price of defender revealed as fears about Virgil van Dijk exit grow
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly learn the price tag of one of Europe's finest young defenders, but rumours persist that Virgil van Dijk could leave the club.

arts.ttl: Slot: We need to be at our very best to beat PSG
arts.sum: Arne Slot believes Liverpool will have to produce one of the best performances of their exceptional season so far if they are to beat Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Champions League. "That is clear, because I see Paris Saint-Germain as being one of the strongest teams in Europe," said Slot, at his pre-match press conference.

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed new Cody Gakpo injury scare for PSG showdown
arts.sum: Reds could be missing a key attacker once again for heavyweight last-16 first-leg tie

arts.ttl: Arsenal ‘Working Hard’ to Secure PSG Target, With €6M per-Year Offer From Inter Milan
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been keeping a close eye on Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months and nearly brought him in last summer. Now, they’re making another attempt to land him, but one club is determined to win the transfer battle. Journalist Christian Falk recently reported that PSG’s interest in Kimmich remains strong, as his […] The post Arsenal ‘Working Hard’ to Secure PSG Target, With €6M per-Year Offer From Inter Milan appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon red card decision made as Liverpool learn Newcastle fate for Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Newcastle United will be without Anthony Gordon for the Carabao Cup Final next month - after making their appeal decision.
